description_long: This sculpture features a stylized bust of a human figure with pronounced, angular facial features and a textured, unfinished surface. The head is slightly tilted forward, and the hair and facial structure are rendered with rough, expressive strokes, giving it a modern, abstract appearance. The bust is mounted on a large, rectangular base made of dark, polished marble with prominent white veining. The back of the bust reveals a series of ridged, vertebrae-like forms, adding a dramatic anatomical element. The contrast between the rough, matte finish of the bust and the glossy, smooth base creates a striking visual juxtaposition. The overall impression is one of strength and intensity, with a focus on both human form and artistic abstraction.
description: A modern, abstract human bust with angular features and a rough, unfinished texture, mounted on a glossy, dark marble base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the intense facial expression, angular features, and the full width of the marble base.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sharp profile, pronounced cheekbones, and the layered texture of the bust.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the ridged, vertebrae-like forms along the back and the broad, flat marble base.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with a clear view of the jawline and the bust's textured surface.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
